title: Beck: Mongolian Chop Squad
sourceNotes: 26 episodes. Manga complete at 103 chapters across 34 volumes. The anime is a close adaptation through episode 24, then compresses and diverges more freely from the start of the American tour arc (manga ch. 23) through its ch. 33 finale; chapters 34-103 (later albums, tours, and international record deals) are unadapted manga-only continuation.
